stages.concept:
# Unit 117: 과거시제의 수동태 / 미래시제의 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **과거시제**와 **미래시제**의 수동태에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **현재시제 수동태**: am/is/are + p.p.

> English **is spoken** all over the world.
> 영어는 전 세계에서 사용된다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **과거시제 수동태**: was/were + p.p.

> The house **was built** in 1990.
> 그 집은 1990년에 지어졌다.

> The windows **were broken** by the storm.
> 창문들이 폭풍에 의해 깨졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **미래시제 수동태**: will be + p.p.

> The new bridge **will be completed** next year.
> 새 다리는 내년에 완공될 것이다.

> The homework **will be finished** by tomorrow.
> 숙제는 내일까지 끝내질 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **진행형 수동태**: am/is/are + being + p.p.

> The road **is being repaired** now.
> 도로가 지금 수리되고 있다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"The new bridge (       ) next year." (새 다리가 내년에 완공될 것이다.)
1. was built
2. will build
3. will be built ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! '새 다리가 내년에 지어질 것이다'라는 미래 수동의 의미이므로 `will be + p.p.` 형태인 `will be built`를 써야 합니다. 다리는 스스로 짓는(build) 것이 아니라 지어지는(be built) 것이니까요!

| 시제 | 수동태 형태 |
|------|------|
| 현재 | am/is/are + p.p. |
| 과거 | was/were + p.p. |
| 미래 | will be + p.p. |
| 진행 | am/is/are being + p.p. |

🧑‍🎓 학생: 시제에 따라 be동사만 바꿔주면 되는 거군요! 간단해요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 117: 과거시제의 수동태/미래시제의 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
The trash (     ) by him this morning.
> **정답** was taken out

---

**02.** The new school ? next year.
> **정답** will be built

---

**03.** The letter ? yesterday.
> **정답** was sent

---

**04.** The meeting ? tomorrow.
> **정답** will be held

---

**05.** The cake ? by my mom last night.
> **정답** was baked

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The homework was finish by her yesterday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** finish → finished

---

**07.** The park will built next year.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will built → will be built

---

**08.** The window was break by the ball.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** break → broken

---

**09.** The report will finished by Friday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will finished → will be finished

---

**10.** The song was sing by her last night.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** sing → sung

---

**11.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꾸시오.
He cleaned the room yesterday.
> **정답** The room was cleaned by him yesterday.

---

**12.** They will build a new bridge.
> **정답** A new bridge will be built by them.

---

**13.** She wrote the report last week.
> **정답** The report was written by her last week.

---

**14.** The company will release a new product.
> **정답** A new product will be released by the company.

---

**15.** He painted the wall last month.
> **정답** The wall was painted by him last month.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그 편지는 어제 보내졌다.
The letter was sent yesterday
> **정답** The / letter / was / sent / yesterday

---

**17.** 새 학교가 내년에 지어질 것이다.
A school new will be built next year
> **정답** A / new / school / will / be / built / next / year

---

**18.** 그 방은 그에 의해 청소되었다.
The room cleaned was by him
> **정답** The / room / was / cleaned / by / him

---

**19.** 회의는 내일 열릴 것이다.
The meeting will held be tomorrow
> **정답** The / meeting / will / be / held / tomorrow

---

**20.** 케이크는 엄마에 의해 만들어졌다.
The cake was by made my mom
> **정답** The / cake / was / made / by / my / mom
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 117: 과거시제의 수동태미래시제의 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
A tornado destroyed the house.
The house destroyed by a tornado.
The house is destroyed by a tornado.
The house was destroyed a tornado.
The house was destroyed by a tornado.
> **정답** The house was destroyed by a tornado.

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Amy will practice the plan.
The plan is practiced Amy.
The plan will practiced by Amy.
The plan will practice by Amy.
The plan will be practiced by Amy.
> **정답** The plan will be practiced by Amy.

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
He wrote a letter.
A letter __________ him
is written by
was written by
will be written by
were written by
> **정답** was written by

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
They will bake cookies tomorrow.
The cookies __________ them tomorrow.
are baked
will be baked
will be baked by
are be baked
> **정답** will be baked by

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Tom took a picture yesterday.
A picture was taken Tom yesterday.
A picture will be taken by Tom yesterday.
A picture was taken by Tom yesterday.
A picture is taken by Tom yesterday.
> **정답** A picture was taken by Tom yesterday.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They will harvest crops tomorrow.
Crops will harvested by them tomorrow.
Crops will be harvested by them tomorrow.
Crops will be harvesting by them tomorrow.
Crops will be harvested them tomorrow.
• harvest 수확하다
• crop 농작물
> **정답** Crops will be harvested by them tomorrow.

---

**07.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
많은 나라들이 영국에 의해 식민지가 되었다.
Many countries ____________ Britain.
were colonized by
was colonized by
were colonized from
are colonized by
• colonize 식민지로 만들다
> **정답** were colonized by

---

**08.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
전화기는 벨에 의해 발명되었다.
The telephone __________ Bell.
was invented
is invented by
was invented by
are invented by
> **정답** was invented by

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
파티는 Tom에 의해 열릴 것이다.
The party __________ by Tom.
held
will be held
be held
will held
> **정답** will be held

---

**10.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 집은 그들에 의해 지어질 것이다.
The house __________ them.
will be built by
will build by
be building by
is built by
> **정답** will be built by

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 세탁물은 세탁기에 의해 세탁될 것이다.
This laundry will wash the washing machine.
This laundry will be washing the washing
machine.
This laundry will be washed by the washing
machine.
This laundry is washed by the washing
machine.
> **정답** This laundry will be washed by the washing
machine.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
많은 사람들이 그 그림에 매료되었다.
The painting were fascinated by many people.
Many people were fascinated the painting.
The painting was fascinated by many people.
Many people were fascinated by the painting.
• fascinate 매료시키다, 마음을 사로잡다
> **정답** Many people were fascinated by the painting.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
The house will be sold next week by him.
All my friends are invited to the party
tomorrow.
The house was robbed last night by a thief.
The church is built ten years ago by an Italian
architect.
> **정답** The church is built ten years ago by an Italian
architect., All my friends are invited to the party
tomorrow.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
The book is written last year by my brother.
Weeds will be pulled out tomorrow by us.
The wall is painted tomorrow by them.
The ingredients for the party were bought
yesterday by her.
• ingredient 재료
> **정답** The ingredients for the party were bought yesterday
by her., Weeds will be pulled out tomorrow by us.

---

**15.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
The lost dog was found by them.
They found the lost dog.
They will find the lost dog.
They find the lost dog.
The lost dog found by them.
> **정답** They found the lost dog.

---

**16.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The concert ticket will be bought by him tomorrow.
He bought the concert ticket tomorrow.
He will be bought the concert ticket
tomorrow.
He buys the concert ticket tomorrow.
He will buy the concert ticket tomorrow.
> **정답** He will buy the concert ticket tomorrow.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The rumor was made by he.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** he. → him

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The computer is delivered by
the seller tomorrow.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → will be

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The bird will be caught a
trap.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a trap. → by a trap

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The baby were fed by his
mother.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** were → was
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 117 과거시제의 수동태미래시제의 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
Many people loved the movie.
The movie  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 was, loved, by, many, people

---

**02.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
The drought will dry the river.
The river  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
• drought 가뭄
정답 will, be, dried, by, the, drought

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
기술은 많은 뛰어난 엔지니어들에 의해 개발되었다.
[develop]
Technology  (     )   (     )   (     )  many brilliant
engineers.
정답 was, developed, by

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 서류는 담당자에 의해 제출될 것이다. [submit]
The document  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the
person in charge.
정답 will, be, submitted, by

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 아이는 야외에서 벌레에 물렸다. [bite]
The child  (     )   (     )   (     )  a bug outside.
정답 was, bitten, by

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
A: What's wrong? He puts band-aid on his hand.
B: He  (     )   (     )   (     )  a knife. Don't worry, he
is okay. [cut]
정답 was, cut, by

---

**07.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
I will use this machine.
This machine  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 will, be, used, by, me

---

**08.** 수동태를 능동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
This promise will be kept by him.
  (     )   (     )  this promise.
정답 He, will, keep

---

**09.** 수동태를 능동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
This mystery was easily solved by them.
  (     )   (     )   (     )  easily.
정답 They, solved, this, mystery

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오.
This fairy tale book [write] (     )  by Joan last
year. The main character in the novel i]s nice and
brave, and helps her friends. This book
[read] (     )  and loved by many children
now.]
• fairy tale 동화
정답 was written, is read

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 117: 과거시제의 수동태·미래시제의 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
A storm damaged the building.
The building damaged by a storm.
The building is damaged by a storm.
The building was damaged a storm.
The building was damaged by a storm.
> 정답: The building was damaged by a storm.

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Tom will rehearse the speech.
The speech is rehearsed Tom.
The speech will rehearsed by Tom.
The speech will rehearse by Tom.
The speech will be rehearsed by Tom.
> 정답: The speech will be rehearsed by Tom.

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She wrote a poem.
A poem __________ her. is written by was written by will be written by were written by
> 정답: was written by

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They will prepare lunch tomorrow.
Lunch __________ them tomorrow. is prepared will be prepared will be prepared by are be prepared
> 정답: will be prepared by

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Tom took a video yesterday.
A video was taken Tom yesterday.
A video will be taken by Tom yesterday.
A video was taken by Tom yesterday.
A video is taken by Tom yesterday.
> 정답: A video was taken by Tom yesterday.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They will gather the materials tomorrow.
Materials will gathered by them tomorrow.
Materials will be gathered by them tomorrow.
Materials will be gathering by them tomorrow.
Materials will be gathered them tomorrow.
> 정답: Materials will be gathered by them tomorrow.

---

**07.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
많은 도시들이 적에 의해 정복되었다.
Many cities ____________ the enemy. were conquered by was conquered by were conquered from are conquered by
> 정답: were conquered by

---

**08.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
전구는 에디슨에 의해 발명되었다.
The light bulb __________ Edison. was invented is invented by was invented by are invented by
> 정답: was invented by

---

**09.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
행사는 Amy에 의해 열릴 것이다.
The event __________ by Amy. held will be held be held will held
> 정답: will be held

---

**10.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그 다리는 그들에 의해 지어질 것이다.
The bridge __________ them. will be built by will build by be building by is built by
> 정답: will be built by

---

**11.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 옷은 세탁기에 의해 세탁될 것이다.
These clothes will wash the washing machine.
These clothes will be washing the washing machine.
These clothes will be washed by the washing machine.
These clothes are washed by the washing machine.
> 정답: These clothes will be washed by the washing

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
많은 관객들이 그 공연에 감동받았다.
The performance were moved by many audience.
Many audience were moved the performance.
The performance was moved by many audience.
Many audience were moved by the performance.
> 정답: Many audience were moved by the performance.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
The car will be sold next week by her.
All my classmates are invited to the trip tomorrow.
The store was robbed last night by a thief.
The tower is built ten years ago by a French architect.
> 정답: The tower is built ten years ago by a French

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
The essay is written last month by my sister.
Supplies will be delivered tomorrow by us.
The fence is painted tomorrow by them.
The decorations for the party were prepared yesterday by her.
> 정답: The decorations for the party were prepared yesterday

---

**15.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
The missing key was found by them.
They found the missing key.
They will find the missing key.
They find the missing key.
The missing key found by them.
> 정답: They found the missing key.

---

**16.** 다음 수동태 문장을 능동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
The movie ticket will be bought by her tomorrow.
She bought the movie ticket tomorrow.
She will be bought the movie ticket tomorrow.
She buys the movie ticket tomorrow.
She will buy the movie ticket tomorrow.
> 정답: She will buy the movie ticket tomorrow.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  story  was  spread  by  he. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: he. → him

---
